title: Kitsune's Origin's pack
description: A Origins pack to play with your friends With the Help of Essentials Mod. Play as a fox, cat, phantom, meowscarada and many more
body:
[![fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a2b308149056069406cafc6ea4bd53edcbc6ea6_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/frog)

**Kitsune's Origin's pack is origins modpack to play with your friends with the help of [Essentials mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)**

**Play As A Fox, Cat, Shulker, A Meowscarada, Kitsune AND MANY MORE**

**Build a Technological base or a farm in the middle of no where or a magical base like hogwarts**

## Play With Your Friends

> With The Essentials Mod You Can Play With Your Friends With Out A Server :O 
> 
> This Modpack Aims To Provide A Way To Play With Friends More Assecible With Out Having to Buy A Server



**_Some of the mods that this pack adds are:_**

- **Timeless And Classic zero**

- **Essentials**
  
- **Origins**
  
- **AE2**
 
- **Ars nouvaeu**
 
- **Bottania**
 
- **Embeddium**
  
- **Mekanism**
 
- **Iron's Spells N' SpellBooks**

AND MANY MORE


**MORE ORIGINS WILL BE ADDED IN THE FUTURE**

Feedback Is Welcomed
